judge_result.short_rationale: All required ingestion actions are present: do not induce vomiting, rinse mouth, drink 200–300 ml water, and seek immediate medical attention. The prohibition appears after the first two steps, so order is slightly different from canonical, but no required action is missing and no unsafe extra advice is added.
